content: Installing Enterprise on CoreOS  Table of contents These instructions describe how to install the latest version of CFEngine Enterprise on CoreOS. The CoreOS package uses a file-system image in order to contain modifications to the root file-system. Download packages Download the file-system image package for CoreOS from the Enterprise Downloads Page . Install package On the CoreOS Host, extract the fs-img-pkg.tar.gz archive: command tar xvf cfengine-nova-3.25.0-1.x86_64.fs-img.pkg.tar.gz On the CoreOS Host, run the install script: command sudo ./cfengine-nova-3.25.0-1.x86_64.fs-img.pkg/install.sh Note: Install actions logged to /var/log/CFEngine-Install.log . Bootstrap Run the bootstrap command: command sudo /var/cfengine/bin/cf-agent --bootstrap <IP address of the Policy Server> Next steps When bootstrapping is complete, CFEngine is up and running on your system. You can begin to manage the host through policy and report on its state from Mission Portal.
title: Installing Enterprise on CoreOS
